title: TSLBW Nutcracker Christmas Welcome Mat, Merry Christmas Decorative Doormat, Washable Non Slip Rubber Door Mat for Indoor Outdoor, 45x75cm (Color B)
features: This Xmas welcome front door mat is made of quality polyester and rubber backing, soft and comfortable, not easy to fade, can quickly absorb the moisture and scrape dirt off shoes, keeping your floor dry and clean.

Our Christmas nutcracker door mat are designed in fashion colors and patterns that are perfect for modern home decor. Classic nutcracker soldier patters and Merry Christmas design can create a strong Christmas atmosphere.

Our tradition welcome doormat is approx. 45*75cm / 17.7x29.52inch length and width, thin and non-slip for indoor and outdoor entrance area. ideal for porch, living room, bathroom, bedroom, kitchen, hotel etc.

The surface of the happy holiday soldier decorative doormat with a firm grip, the decorative floor mat can be fixed in the right place to avoid sliding, will not prevent you from opening the door when it is placed by the door.

Christmas Nutcracker doormat which brings a strong Christmas atmosphere to your house, and the unique nutcracker pattern will be praised by your guests, which is very suitable for your Christmas decoration.
description: Product description Christmas Doormat Nutcracker Christmas Mats Welcome Decorative Doormat Merry Christmas Doormat Washable Non Slip and Washable Rubber Nutcracker Door Mat for Indoor Outdoor,45x75cm Specification Material: Polyester Style: as shown in the picture Quantity: 1pcs Christmas Nutcracker Floor Mat Size: 45*75cm / 17.7x29.52inch feature This Xmas welcome front door mat is thick and soft, no odor, can quickly absorb the moisture and scrape dirt off shoes, keeping your floor dry and clean. The mat with tradition Nutcracker patterns and Merry Christmas, the bright color looks very suitable for Christmas decoration, bringing a strong Christmas atmosphere to your house. Our Christmas floor mat size is 45*75cm/17.7x29.52inch length and width, this size is suitable for most living rooms rooms and bathrooms, etc. Adorable Christmas pattern non-slip rubber backing entry door mat provides maximum grip to prevent you to skid while you walk, ensure it stay in place for safe. Merry Christmas printed indoor carpet can be seamlessly integrated into any existing decoration, can creates a warm and comfortable atmosphere. Safety Warning Place the doormat on a stable surface and avoid placing it near heat sources or electrical appliances to avoid fire hazard. Do not use candles or cigarettes near the doormat.
